message:
🌱 Add vllm: [New Model]: allenai/Molmo-7B-0-0924 VisionLM mission (#852)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "vllm-8808-new-model-allenai-molmo-7b-0-0924-visionlm",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "vllm: Support allenai/Molmo-7B VisionLM",
+    "description": "Add support for the Allen AI Molmo-7B-O-0924 vision-language model in vLLM. Molmo is an open multimodal model from the Allen Institute for AI that processes both text and images. Requested by 26+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current vLLM setup",
+        "description": "Verify your vLLM version and configuration:\n```bash\npip show vllm | grep Version\n# or\npython -c \"import vllm; print(vllm.__version__)\"\n```\nMolmo model support requires a recent version of vLLM with the Molmo model architecture registered."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Understand the Molmo model",
+        "description": "Molmo is a family of open vision-language models from Allen AI:\n- [allenai/Molmo-7B-O-0924](https://huggingface.co/allenai/Molmo-7B-O-0924) - 7B parameter model\n- Part of the [Molmo collection](https://huggingface.co/collections/allenai/molmo-66f379e6fe3b8ef090a8ca19)\n\nMolmo can process both text and image inputs, making it suitable for multimodal tasks like image captioning, visual question answering, and more."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Serve Molmo with vLLM",
+        "description": "Start the vLLM server with the Molmo model:\n```bash\npython -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server \\\n  --model allenai/Molmo-7B-O-0924 \\\n  --trust-remote-code\n```\nThe `--trust-remote-code` flag is required because Molmo uses custom model code from the HuggingFace repository."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify Molmo inference works",
+        "description": "Test that Molmo model serving is working with a text-only query:\n```bash\ncurl http://localhost:8000/v1/chat/completions \\\n  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n  -d '{\"model\": \"allenai/Molmo-7B-O-0924\", \"messages\": [{\"role\": \"user\", \"content\": \"Describe the key features of a good programming language.\"}], \"max_tokens\": 100}'\n```\nFor multimodal (image + text) queries, use the vision endpoint with base64-encoded images or image URLs."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "vLLM added support for the Allen AI Molmo family of vision-language models by integrating the Molmo model architecture. This enables high-throughput serving of Molmo models for both text-only and multimodal (image + text) inference tasks through vLLM's serving engine.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "# Serve Molmo-7B with vLLM\npython -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server \\\n  --model allenai/Molmo-7B-O-0924 \\\n  --trust-remote-code"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "vllm",
+      "community",
+      "llm-serving",
+      "feature",
+      "molmo",
+      "vision-language",
+      "multimodal"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "vllm"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/issues/8808",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/9016"
+    },
+    "reactions": 26,
+    "comments": 17,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "python",
+      "pip"
+    ],
+    "description": "Python 3.8+, pip, a CUDA-capable GPU with sufficient VRAM (16GB+ recommended), and a working vLLM installation (pip install vllm)."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:45:46.416Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
